overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit waterfront promenade at night. The character transitions between open waterfront areas and covered walkways with large digital billboards, showcasing the game's futuristic urban environment with wet reflective surfaces and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade transitioning to covered walkway

events.description: character enters covered walkway with purple neon lighting from open waterfront
character slows from running to walking and approaches the large digital billboard

agents.ego_description: running along the wet waterfront promenade and entering a covered walkway with purple neon lighting

entered.detail: wide paved walkway along the water with reflective wet surface
circular concrete planter with palm tree
transparent glass safety railing along the waterfront edge
tall building with illuminated 05 signage on top
overhead structure providing shelter with exposed beams
large curved digital screen displaying pink neon advertisement for Naranjita with woman's face

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wet waterfront promenade at night, passing palm trees and glass railings with futuristic skyscrapers in the background. The scene transitions as the character enters a covered walkway illuminated by purple neon lights, approaching a large digital billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with large digital advertisements

events.description: character comes to a complete stop near the billboard
character looks around, observing the surroundings and billboard advertisements

agents.ego_description: standing still near the large digital billboard, looking around the covered walkway and examining the environment

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking along the waterfront visible through the walkway opening

entered.detail: simple concrete seating block near the walkway wall
scattered litter and debris on the ground near the bench

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary in the covered walkway, illuminated by the bright pink glow of the Naranjita digital billboard. The camera pans slightly as the character looks around the sheltered space, with the wet waterfront visible in the background and minimal pedestrian activity.

events.description: character begins walking again through the covered corridor
character exits the covered walkway back to the open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor past various billboards and advertisements toward the open promenade

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing against the wall looking at a device

entered.detail: large advertisement with red text reading HATE YOUR ENEMY
digital advertisement displaying BODY text with futuristic imagery
enclosed pedestrian passage with overhead metal beams and lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the covered corridor, passing the aggressive red HATE billboard and other advertisements. The enclosed space features industrial metal overhead structures and scattered debris, with the character moving toward the visible exit back to the open waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with commercial storefronts

events.description: exiting covered corridor into open waterfront promenade with storefronts
character slows to walking speed while passing the OLIV store

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront promenade past the OLIV store and other pedestrians, with the city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt standing near the OLIV storefront looking at window display
pedestrian in red shirt walking along the promenade

entered.detail: modern storefront with yellow neon OLIV signage and teal accent lighting along the base
elevated pedestrian bridge with illuminated supports spanning across the promenade
metal and glass railing separating the walkway from the water
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into the open waterfront promenade, passing the brightly lit OLIV store with its distinctive yellow signage. The wide open space features an elevated pedestrian bridge overhead, scattered pedestrians, and expansive views of the illuminated cyberpunk city skyline across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, rain-slicked waterfront into a neon-drenched covered corridor before emerging back into the expansive city skyline. It begins with the character running along a wet promenade past palm trees and glass railings, moving seamlessly from the open air into a sheltered walkway bathed in purple neon light. As the character pauses beneath the bright pink glow of a Naranjita digital billboard, the camera pans to capture the contrast between the enclosed space and the distant waterfront. The scene then shifts as the character advances through the industrial corridor, passing aggressive red advertisements and metal overhead structures before heading toward the exit. Finally, the camera follows the character as they emerge from the shelter, passing the yellow signage of an OLIV store to reveal a wide pedestrian bridge and the illuminated cyberpunk skyline across the water.
